strategy.name: Contrarian Golden/Death Cross (TradingView-matched)
strategy.description: Matches the TradingView 'Contrarian G/D Cross' indicator exactly. Uses the 5m MA50/MA200 cross to define the regime, then fades the trend — buying RSI(14) exhaustion (≤38) in death cross regimes and selling RSI(14) exhaustion (≥62) in golden cross regimes. StochRSI, BB, Volume, and VWAP are signal strength boosters only — they scale position size but never block a trade.

indicators.regime_5m_ma50_ma200: MA50 vs MA200 calculated on 5-minute candles — 5-day view. MA50 on 5m = 50×5min = ~4.2 hours. MA200 on 5m = 200×5min = ~16.7 hours. Death cross (MA50 < MA200) = buy regime. Golden cross (MA50 > MA200) = sell regime.
indicators.rsi_14: RSI over 14 periods — standard setting, matches TradingView indicator. Below 38 = oversold (buy signal in death cross). Above 62 = overbought (sell signal in golden cross). Asymmetric thresholds centred around 50 with equal margins.
indicators.bollinger_bands: 20-period BB with 2 standard deviations. Signal strength BOOSTER only — not a hard gate. Price at/beyond lower/upper band increases position size.
indicators.stoch_rsi: Stochastic RSI (14,14,3,3). Signal strength BOOSTER only — not a hard gate. Below 50 on bullish / above 50 on bearish adds confirmation weight.
indicators.volume_booster: Volume is a SIGNAL STRENGTH BOOSTER, not a gate. High volume (≥1.5x avg) on an oversold condition = higher confidence = larger position size. Low volume = smaller size but trade still valid.
indicators.vwap_bands: VWAP with ±1σ and ±2σ bands anchored to session start. Price at ±2σ VWAP band = institutionally significant exhaustion level. Used as strength booster.
indicators.atr_14: ATR(14) on 5m candles for dynamic stop placement. Stop = 1.5x ATR from entry. Scales with actual volatility rather than fixed %.

regime.source: 5-minute candles — MA50 vs MA200 on the 5-day/5m chart (matches TradingView 5D view)
regime.death_cross: MA50 (5m) is below MA200 (5m) — short-term bearish. Bot looks for BUY signals only (contrarian: fade oversold dips).
regime.golden_cross: MA50 (5m) is above MA200 (5m) — short-term bullish. Bot looks for SELL signals only (contrarian: fade overbought exhaustion).

long: REGIME: 5m MA50 below 5m MA200 (death cross — looking for BUY signals only)
RSI(14) at or below 38 — oversold on 5m timeframe (matches TradingView indicator)
short: REGIME: 5m MA50 above 5m MA200 (golden cross — looking for SELL signals only)
RSI(14) at or above 62 — overbought on 5m timeframe (matches TradingView indicator)
entry_rules.note: Only 2 hard gates: Regime + RSI(14). Everything else (BB, StochRSI, Volume, VWAP) is a signal strength booster that scales position size from 20% to 100% of MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD.

signal_strength_boosters: RSI(14) depth — deeper below 38 (buys) or above 62 (sells) = larger position
BB position — price at/beyond lower/upper band adds confidence
StochRSI below 50 (buys) / above 50 (sells) adds timing confirmation
Volume ≥ 1.0x average — capitulation confirmed, increases position size
Price at VWAP ±2σ band — institutional-grade exhaustion level, increases position size
Deeper regime separation (MA50 vs MA200 gap) — stronger macro conviction, increases position size
exit_rules: Primary: Price reverts to Bollinger Band middle (20-period SMA) — mean reversion target hit
Stop loss: 1.5x ATR(14) below entry for longs, above entry for shorts — dynamic, volatility-scaled
Time stop: If position not at target within 15 candles (75 minutes on 5m), exit — it's become a trend not a reversion
Take profit: 2.5x ATR(14) from entry for full exit
risk_rules: Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env — scales 20%-100% with signal strength
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Volume acts as position sizer, not a blocker — low volume = smaller size, high volume = full size
Spot trading only: shorts require holding the asset; buys only in death cross regime
Paper trade first — validate fill quality and slippage before going live
notes: Matches TradingView 'Contrarian G/D Cross' indicator exactly. Key design decisions: (1) 5m MA50/MA200 for regime — same chart as entry signals. (2) RSI(14) at 38/62 — standard period, asymmetric thresholds centred at 50. (3) StochRSI/BB/Volume are boosters only — they scale size, never block a trade. (4) ATR-based stops scale with actual volatility. (5) 15-candle time stop prevents trend-fighting.
